creationDate.description: The creation date of the object. Datetime in UTC in the https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt format, example = "2025-01-22T11:21:33.872Z".

fieldTypes.description: The field types of the timeline event type.

lastModifiedDate.description: The last modified date of the object. Datetime in UTC in the https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt format, example = "2025-01-22T11:21:33.872Z".

mappingFrontendEventType.description: The identifier of the frontend event this event type maps on.

mappingSystemEventType.description: The identifier of the system event this event type maps on.

priority.description: The priority of the timeline event type.

retentionPeriod.description: The retention period of the timeline event type.

source.description: The source of the timeline event type.
